description_long: This is a robust, single-bladed axe with a dark, metallic finish and a straight, elongated handle. The head of the axe features a wide, slightly flared blade on one side and a flat poll on the opposite, giving it a balanced, functional appearance. The handle is rectangular in cross-section, tapering slightly towards the end, and appears to be reinforced with metallic elements, possibly for added durability. Decorative elements, such as a red gem-like accent and gold markings, are visible near the top of the handle, suggesting a ceremonial or high-status tool. The surface is glossy and reflective, with minor signs of wear, indicating it is both practical and visually striking. This axe would be suitable for display or use in urban emergency, utility, or ceremonial contexts.
description: A dark, metallic axe with a wide blade, straight reinforced handle, and decorative red and gold accents near the head. The surface is glossy and shows minor wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full blade profile, decorative top, and handle details.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the blade and handle profile, with decorative elements still visible.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, again showing the thin profile of the axe.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, rectangular cross-section handle, likely wood with metallic reinforcement, smooth surface, no visible grip texture.
attribute_blade_design: Single wide blade with a slightly flared edge, flat poll on the opposite side, no beard, decorative red and gold accents near the top.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible metallic reinforcement at the head.
